response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate despite a significant mismatch in the specific technology stack (Java/Kotlin/Spring). His past experience working directly on a C IDE at National Instruments and his extensive personal projects focused on language tooling and developer experience (albeit in Dlang) are exceptionally rare and highly relevant to the core problem domain. These factors suggest he possesses the fundamental skills and passion for building developer tools. An interview is recommended to assess his interest and ability to quickly learn the required JVM ecosystem, as he could be a high-value hire due to his unique background.
strengths: Direct professional experience building components for a commercial IDE (NI LabWindows/CVI).
Demonstrated deep interest and personal initiative in creating developer and language tooling (e.g., test runners, assert libraries).
Broad experience working on complex, large-scale systems, from high-throughput microservices to desktop applications.
concerns: No mention of Kotlin or the Spring ecosystem, both of which are core to the role.
Java experience appears to be minimal and is not recent (last mentioned in a 2016-2018 role).
Recent professional experience is heavily focused on TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, not the JVM.
